violations.text: Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Chow mein gravy and RI chowder were observed in the refrigerator in containers covered and greater than four inches deep temping between 76-100 degrees. Lids were removed from foods and foods were placed into ice baths to continue cooling process. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025

Reduced oxygen packaged lobster was observed at 41 and 42 degrees Fahrenheit stored in the walk-in cooler with the packaging intact. Reduced oxygen packaged seafood must be completely removed from packaging prior to thawing. Lobster was voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025
